Name: Stardew HDT Physics
Author: JosephsDeadish
Description: Zero-requirement plug-and-play physics mod: body jiggle, HDT hair (reacts to wind/rain/snow), idle motion, ragdoll knockback, monster physics, NPC sword knockdown, and environmental grass physics. Optional GMCM for in-game sliders. Compatible with LewdEW, Valley Girls, XTardew, HornyFur, Anthro, Fashion Sense, and all custom sprite/hair mods.
